rules.comment: On exploration_t1 complete: thaw mountain region (E1 API).
On industry_t3 complete: thaw desert region (Task 12 adds the region entity — until then thaw_region is a silent no-op per Task 1 contract).
Apply TechPoint write-back from interact_poi / start_research (emit tp-set {value} -> @player.TechPoint.value).
